name: Starters
description: Versatile small dishes for snacking, as starters, or as a main dish.

items.name: KIM-MARI
items.description: 6 glass noodles wrapped in kim seaweed, crispy fried with home-made soy sauce dressing.

items.name: MUL MANDU
items.description: 5 home made steamed dumplings filled with delicate vegetables, tofu, and glass noodles, with home-made soy sauce.

items.name: GUN MANDU
items.description: 5 deep-fried dumplings filled with delicate vegetables, tofu, & glass noodles, with home-made soy sauce.

items.name: GUN DAK MANDU
items.description: 5 deep-fried dumplings filled with chicken, vegetables, & home-made soy sauce.

items.name: MUL DAK MANDU
items.description: 5 steamed dumplings filled with chicken, vegetables, & home-made soy sauce.

items.name: OJINGER TWIGIM
items.description: Crispy battered deep-fried squid rings & home-made soy sauce.

items.name: KIMCHI JEON
items.description: Korean thin pancake with kimchi & spring onions.
items.dietary_info: LIGHT SPICY A / B / D / F / K

items.name: HAEMUL PAJEON
items.description: Korean thin pancake with seafood & spring onions.
items.dietary_info: A / B / C / D / F / K / N

items.name: KIMCHI SAMGYEOBSAL BOKKEUM
items.description: Fried kimchi & pork belly with fresh tofu.
items.dietary_info: LIGHT SPICY A / B / D / F / K

items.name: MISO-SALMON SOUP
items.description: With salmon, tofu, seaweed, & spring onions.

items.name: YANGNYEOM CHICKEN
items.description: Crispy fried chicken strips with a spicy and sweet sauce with a fine touch of cinnamon on a bed of fine-cut lettuce.
